svg.title: Concurrency model per stage
svg.desc: Three stages of the course scraper, each showing how 5 parallel workers are arranged: Stage 1 spawns one browser context per page, Stage 2 uses lightweight threads for network calls, Stage 3 spawns one browser context per video.
svg.text: Pure network I/O, light per worker
Stages 1 and 3 spend most time in network/render — threads sit idle while browsers work.
